## Summary

Describe the behavior added or changed.

## TDD evidence

- [ ] A test failed for the expected reason before production code changed.
- [ ] The smallest implementation made the test pass.
- [ ] The full test suite passes after refactoring.

## Safety and concurrency review

- [ ] Hard constraints and failure behavior were considered.
- [ ] Idempotency and concurrent requests were considered.
- [ ] Database/API/XML compatibility was considered where relevant.

## Verification

List commands and results.

## Thesis and documentation

- [ ] Relevant documentation and thesis evidence were updated, or this change has
      no thesis/documentation impact.
